name: ado-bug-agent
description: Turn Azure DevOps Bugs into durable bug reports and code-backed root-cause analysis drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Azure DevOps Bugs into report drafts.
interface.longDescription: Fetch Azure DevOps Bugs through a bundled MCP server, create durable bug reports, and draft code-backed root-cause analyses for later implementation.
defaultPrompt: Set up my ADO Bug defaults.
